name: Prompt test_progress.py Update
description: After a task is completed, remind the agent to update test_progress.py with the minimum assertion for the file just built

then.prompt: A task just completed. If a new production file was built, update test_progress.py with the minimum assertion that confirms the file works — one fast check, under 5 seconds total runtime. Do not add multiple assertions. Do not turn it into a test suite. One assertion per file built.
